title: WE! (Workout Empowerment!) Fitness
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: 12-week incentive-based fitness programme featuring low-to-medium intensity circuit training guided by a fitness coach. Promotes Healthy Eating and Active Living for seniors.
venueAddress: Blk 261 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-01, Singapore 560261

title: Calligraphy & Arts Workshop
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Creative arts session including Chinese calligraphy practice and guided painting. Part of SLEC's regular arts programme with occasional excursions to the National Gallery for inspiration.
venueAddress: Blk 261 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-01, Singapore 560261

title: Ukulele Club & Sing-Along
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Music interest group where seniors learn ukulele and sing uplifting songs together. Part of SLEC's performing arts programme fostering creativity and social bonding.
venueAddress: Blk 261 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-01, Singapore 560261

title: Health Screening & Fall Risk Assessment
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Regular health checks including blood pressure, blood glucose, diabetes screening and retinal checks. Includes functional fall risk assessments in partnership with SingHealth.
venueAddress: Blk 261 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-01, Singapore 560261

title: Golden Memories Digital Programme
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Innovative digital literacy programme where seniors learn smartphone skills and use the AI-powered MemoryLane platform to narrate and publish their life stories as printed books and audiobooks.
venueAddress: Blk 261 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-01, Singapore 560261

title: Share-A-Pot & Social Games
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Community bonding through SLEC's Share-A-Pot communal meal programme and afternoon of board games, card games and social activities fostering friendships among neighbourhood seniors.
venueAddress: Blk 261 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-01, Singapore 560261

title: Share-A-Pot & Social Games
description: Community bonding through SLEC's Share-A-Pot communal meal programme and afternoon of board games, card games and social activities fostering friendships among neighbourhood seniors.

title: Yoga & Brisk Walking
description: Morning fitness session combining gentle yoga practice and guided brisk walks around the neighbourhood, promoting cardiovascular health and flexibility for seniors.

title: The Ageless Label Craft Workshop
description: Hands-on craft workshop under the Ageless Label programme where seniors create handmade merchandise including origami, knitting, crochet and fuse bead crafts. Proceeds from sales fund the programme.

title: Community Nurse Post Health Screening
description: Weekly in-centre health consultations by Changi General Hospital community nurses for chronic disease management, vital signs monitoring and health screening.

title: Karaoke & Music Session
description: Fun karaoke and music appreciation session featuring classic songs in multiple languages, encouraging social interaction and emotional well-being among seniors.

title: Digital Literacy Workshop
description: Step-by-step digital skills training covering smartphone basics, social media, e-payments and online safety for community seniors at TAAC.

title: Befriending & Social Connector Programme
description: Structured befriending programme with home visits and phone calls for socially isolated seniors, plus the Social Connector programme helping seniors follow through on lifestyle interventions.

title: Zumba & Qigong Fitness
description: Group fitness session combining Zumba dance moves and traditional Qigong meditative exercises. Adapted for seniors with low-impact options and Chair Zumba for those with mobility needs.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: Pressed Flower Bookmark Making
description: Creative workshop where seniors learn to press and arrange dried flowers into decorative bookmarks. Part of THK's signature craft programme — finished bookmarks are sold commercially at Marina Bay Sands.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: Health Screening & Wellness Check
description: Regular health monitoring including blood pressure, blood glucose and functional mobility screening. Conducted in partnership with SingHealth community nurses under the Healthier SG initiative.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: Digital Skills for Life Workshop
description: Interactive digital skills workshop aligned with Singapore's national Digital Skills for Life (DSL) framework, covering smartphone use, online communications, e-payments and cybersecurity awareness.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: Rummy-O & Social Games
description: Afternoon of Rummy-O tile games, bingo and mahjong sessions. THK holds inter-centre Rummy-O competitions across its 18 AACs, building friendly rivalry and cognitive stimulation.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: Karaoke & Sing-Along Session
description: Weekly karaoke and singing session featuring golden-era hits and dialect favourites. Facilitated by trained senior micro-jobbers as part of THK's pioneering Micro-Jobs Programme.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: Zumba Gold Fitness
description: Fun, low-impact Zumba Gold fitness class adapted for active seniors, combining Latin dance moves with easy-to-follow choreography for cardiovascular health.

title: Angklung Clan Music Session
description: Learn and perform traditional angklung music in this popular interest group. Seniors master the bamboo instrument while building ensemble skills and friendships.

title: Acrylic Painting Workshop
description: Guided acrylic painting class where seniors explore colour mixing, composition and creative expression on canvas, building an art portfolio over the term.

title: Health Screening & Wellness Check
description: Comprehensive health screening conducted near seniors' residences, including blood pressure, blood glucose, BMI and basic health assessment.

title: Digital Wellness Workshop
description: IMDA-partnered digital wellness programme covering smartphone mastery, mobile apps, e-payments, cybersecurity awareness and safe online practices for seniors.

title: Bingo & Social Games Afternoon
description: Lively afternoon of bingo, Rummy-O, chess and other social games promoting cognitive stimulation and community bonding among seniors.

title: Yoga for Seniors
description: Gentle chair and mat yoga session designed for seniors, focusing on flexibility, breathing techniques, balance and relaxation.

title: Healthy Eating Workshop
description: Nutrition education workshop where seniors learn about balanced diets, healthy cooking methods and meal planning for common health conditions.

title: Zumba Gold Fitness
description: Fun, low-impact Zumba Gold fitness class adapted for active seniors, combining Latin dance moves with easy-to-follow choreography for cardiovascular health.

title: Angklung Clan Music Session
description: Learn and perform traditional angklung music in this popular interest group. Seniors master the bamboo instrument while building ensemble skills and friendships.

title: Acrylic Painting Workshop
description: Guided acrylic painting class where seniors explore colour mixing, composition and creative expression on canvas, building an art portfolio over the term.

title: Health Screening & Wellness Check

title: Digital Wellness Workshop

title: Bingo & Social Games Afternoon
description: Lively afternoon of bingo, Rummy-O, chess and other social games promoting cognitive stimulation and community bonding among seniors.

title: Yoga for Seniors
description: Gentle chair and mat yoga session designed for seniors, focusing on flexibility, breathing techniques, balance and relaxation.

title: Healthy Eating Workshop
description: Nutrition education workshop where seniors learn about balanced diets, healthy cooking methods and meal planning for common health conditions.

title: SCOPE Diabetes Management Programme
description: Weekly community participation programme for residents aged 55+ with diabetes. Interactive workshops covering diet, exercise, medication and 12 aspects of holistic diabetes self-care.

title: Guided Autobiography (GAB) Group
description: Semi-structured life review programme developed by Dr James E. Birren using reminiscence and narrative therapy. Seniors reflect on life themes to find meaning and build social connections.

title: ComSA Club Activities
description: Peer-led interest group sessions at ComSA Whampoa including dancing, singing, sports and craftwork. Activities are planned and facilitated by trained ComSA Champions.

title: Curating Whampoa Heritage Walk
description: Community heritage programme where seniors document and share Whampoa's cultural history through photography, storytelling and neighbourhood walks as part of the Curating Whampoa project.

title: Cafe Kawan Cooking Session
description: Social cooking programme at Cafe Kawan where seniors take turns sharing family recipes, preparing dishes together and enjoying meals as a community.

title: Community Gardening
description: Hands-on gardening session at the community garden where seniors grow herbs and vegetables, learning sustainable practices and enjoying therapeutic outdoor activity.

title: Craftwork & Beading Workshop
description: Creative arts session where seniors learn beading, craft techniques and decorative art, building fine motor skills while socialising with peers.

title: SWING Community Action Group
description: 8-week programme where seniors identify local community issues and plan collective actions to improve age-friendly housing and neighbourhood environments in Whampoa.
